note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left foot measures aprx 5.3 x 4.5cm, depth 0.8cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 3.2x2.7, 0.4cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 5.3 cm x 4.5 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 24% slough, 76% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Foam dressing change daily.
